summary: Phase 3 frontend testing: Assignment-Conflict Assistant. All core conflict detection, badge display, assign dialog, and data-testid requirements are fully passing. Tested login as manager demo, Game Assignments tab conflict badges, assign dialog with best-fit banner, referee card selection, conflict detail text, and data persistence after assignment.

issues: Completed game-4 (Capital Cougars) shows a red 'Issue' conflict indicator badge — completed games display conflict indicators which may be intentional but slightly clutters the completed row. Minor cosmetic observation only.

'Missing Cert' (yellow) and 'No Avail. Data' (grey) badge types are not visible in the assignments table with the current seed data (no referee is assigned to a game with missing certs as their top-priority status — Jordan's conflict takes priority). Both badge types DO appear correctly in the Assign dialog. Not a bug, just seed data coverage gap.

critical_code_review_comments: conflictUtils.js is well-structured. The priority ordering (conflict > unavailable > missing-certs > no-data > available) is correctly implemented and tested.
GameAssignmentsTab getGameConflictLevel does not filter out completed games, so game-4 (completed) shows a red 'Issue' badge — minor design decision worth confirming is intentional.
AssignRefereeDialog correctly filters out already-assigned referees from the ranked list using alreadyAssignedIds.
test_credentials: manager@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager on /login page)
seed_data_creation: Added a temporary test game (game-test-conflict) via localStorage in one test run to verify conflict detail text in the assign dialog. Not persisted across sessions.
mocked_api: MOCKED: All data via localStorage demoDataService.js (v3 storage key)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Assignment-Conflict Assistant is fully implemented and tested. All conflict badge data-testids are present. Storage key is iwhistle_demo_data_v3. Jordan Ellis (ref-jordan) is assigned to both game-3 and game-5 (same day, overlapping times — Apr 7) creating the conflict scenario. Olivia Brooks (ref-olivia) is assigned to game-3 with availability Apr+3 to Apr+5, showing 'Ready'. Demo Referee is on game-1 with availability day+1 to day+2. Login via /login → 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Manager'.
